# Q12 if() exfil flag column keeping all hosts (data exfil volume)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Data-exfiltration by volume — rank egress by bytes moved per host/destination. Q12 if() exfil flag column keeping all hosts.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows | comp sum(bytes_out) as total_out, sum(bytes_in) as total_in by host | filter total_in > 0 | alter ratio = divide(to_float(total_out), to_float(total_in)) | alter exfil_flag = if(ratio > 50, "EXFIL", "normal") | sort desc ratio | fields host, total_out, total_in, ratio, exfil_flag
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 8). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
